data.title: Bitcoin's price could reach $124,500 with key support at $112,000 holding through September, technical analysis shows.
data.description: The current Bitcoin price prediction indicates a near-term target of $124,500 if the cryptocurrency can uphold its support level at $112,000. Technical analysis suggests a potential breakout window within the next 7 to 14 days.

data.title: Trailblazer Lisa Cook, first Black woman on Fed board, targeted by Trump. She challenges norms in a white male-dominated field.
data.description: Ms. Cook, the initial African American woman to hold a position on the Federal Reserve board, has established herself as a trailblazer in an industry primarily led by white males.

data.title: Military presence leads to decrease in restaurant business in Washington.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that there has been a 10% increase in confirmed cases of COVID-19 in the past week, bringing the total number of cases to 100,000. The number of deaths related to the virus has also risen by 5%, reaching a total of 2,000. Additionally, there has been a significant surge in the number of hospitalizations, with a 15% increase noted. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and restrictions to curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Donald Trump, as a new activist investor, demands govt stakes in US firms & a share of revenue, reminiscent of state-managed capitalism.
data.description: The president has called for the government to acquire stakes in American companies and receive a portion of their profits. This move has drawn comparisons to state-controlled capitalism practiced in various global regions.

data.title: All-female hacker house in SF's Glen Park - FoundHer House - offers support to residents as they build start-ups.
data.description: Located in San Francisco's Glen Park neighborhood, FoundHer House stands out as a unique all-female hacker house. Here, residents are fostering a supportive environment to develop their start-ups.

data.title: Trump's proposed tariffs may impact numerous common U.S. medications, potentially affecting millions of consumers.
data.description: The proposed pharmaceutical tariffs by President Trump could impact numerous widely used drugs in the American market.

data.title: Changes to student loan repayment plans are impacting federal loans. Stay informed on how to repay loans and avoid tax issues.
data.description: Legal disputes and new laws have significantly impacted federal student loans. It is crucial to understand key information for repayment and navigating potential tax implications. Stay informed to effectively manage your loans.

data.title: Tariffs put US board game makers in a tough spot, jeopardizing the industry's future amid trade war uncertainty.
data.description: The uncertainty surrounding the trade war is leading board and card game publishers in the US to face challenging choices, potentially endangering the industry's prospects.

data.title: VanEck launches TruSector ETFs for precise sector exposure with full market-cap alignment.
data.description: VanEck's TruSector ETFs have been designed to bolster asset allocation strategies by providing complete exposure to market-cap sectors, aligning closely with sector benchmarks to enhance precision. These ETFs are structured to offer investors a comprehensive view of various sectors, ultimately leading to more accurate allocation decisions. The approach aims to optimize portfolio diversification and performance by closely mirroring sector benchmarks.

data.title: New event in Mirandus by Gala Games with legendary assassin Fintan brings rewards for players from August 28 to September 1, 2025.
data.description: Gala Games has introduced a fresh event within the virtual world of Mirandus, showcasing the renowned assassin known as Fintan. Running from August 28 to September 1, 2025, players have the opportunity to partake in this event to secure rewards through engaging in leaderboards and unveiling mystery chests. This event promises an exciting experience for participants, allowing them to immerse themselves in the fantastical realm of Mirandus and potentially earn valuable prizes.

data.title: New Character.AI CEO discusses advancements after 60 days in office: Model enhancements and new features introduced.
data.description: The Chief Executive Officer of Character.AI provides an update on key strategic advancements, including enhancements to models and introduction of new features, following his initial 60 days in the position. (For more details, click on the link provided)

data.title: Cost Basis Distribution (CBD) reveals market highs and lows by analyzing profit and loss-driven spending trends, offering valuable market insights.
data.description: Analyze how Cost Basis Distribution (CBD) serves to pinpoint market peaks and troughs by examining patterns of profit-driven and loss-driven spending. This offers valuable insights into market sentiment and behavior. This tool is particularly useful in identifying key market trends and making informed investment decisions. By understanding CBD, investors can better navigate market fluctuations and capitalize on potential opportunities.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ether surge as crypto sentiment turns to Greed on Federal Reserve hints of possible rate cut in September.
data.description: On Saturday, a widely-used cryptocurrency sentiment tracker notably rose back into Greed territory following comments from Fed Chair Jerome Powell regarding a potential rate reduction in September.

data.title: Trader James Wynn enters a 25x Ether long position as ETH hits a record high, with Dogecoin trade facing losses.
data.description: Experienced trader James Wynn has attracted attention once again for his high-risk strategy, holding a 25x long position on Ether that has yielded significant profits. On the other hand, his simultaneous bet on Dogecoin is facing challenges as it remains in the negative.

data.title: India drone market valued at $0.47 billion in 2025, to reach $1.39 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 24.4%. Growth projected.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on August 23, 2025, the India drone (UAV) sector is valued at around USD 0.47 billion for 2025 and is forecasted to hit approximately USD 1.39 billion by 2030, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 24.4%. This data originates from a recently released report by MarketsandMarkets™. The market for drones in India is experiencing substantial growth...

data.title: Boca Bearing Company announces new 2025 stock list with comprehensive range of needle bearings for modern industry.
data.description: A renowned expert in miniature needle bearings, Boca Bearing Company has unveiled its latest 2025 stock list. The updated catalog showcases a wide array of needle bearings ready for immediate purchase, catering to the varied requirements of modern industrial sectors.

data.title: ColoBarn acquires Omnis clients, moves them to new facility in Tempe, Phoenix. Successful acquisition of Omnis Network's colocation customer base.
data.description: A leading provider of colocation services and managed infrastructure in the Phoenix Metro Area, ColoBarn, has recently acquired Omnis Network's colocation customer base. This strategic move involves the transfer of all customers previously hosted in Omnis's facility to ColoBarn's. This acquisition marks a significant expansion for ColoBarn, increasing its customer base number and solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Usta International establishes Artificial Glaciers Kyrgyzstan to fight glacier retreat with tech, AI, and eco-tourism.
data.description: Usta International, located in Bishkek, has introduced an innovative project known as Artificial Glaciers Kyrgyzstan. This initiative combines patented engineering, artificial intelligence, and eco-tourism to address the issue of glacier retreat in the region. The project aims to protect Central Asia's crucial water resources while also promoting collaboration in the scientific community.

data.title: Sandpiper, LLC opens ECHO Suites Extended Stay by Wyndham in Reno in mid-July. Grand opening announced.
data.description: In mid-July of 2025, the newly launched ECHO Suites Extended Stay by Wyndham hotel made its debut in Richmond, Virginia. Sandpiper, LLC proudly revealed the opening of ECHO Suites Extended Stay by Wyndham in Reno, Nevada. This new hotel, developed from scratch, aims to provide exceptional accommodation services.

data.title: Wavytalk featured in TikTok Shop's New Arrivals with Blowout Boost Grande and exclusive deals. NY, Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: A renowned hair tools brand, Wavytalk, is set to introduce its newest product along with substantial discounts, creator content, and a back-to-school campus event in New York on August 22, 2025. Wavytalk is acclaimed for its salon-grade outcomes achieved at home.
